title: mekedron/ClipSlop
summary: AI writing tool for macOS — fix grammar, translate, rewrite, format text with a hotkey. Chain prompts into pipelines. Works with ChatGPT, Anthropic, Ollama. Free and open-source.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with Qwen 3.6). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: nyldn/claude-octopus
summary: Put up to 8 AI models on every coding task — blind spots surface before you ship. Claude Code plugin.

title: CorvidLabs/corvid-agent

title: hsaghir/looplet
summary: The tool-calling loop for LLM agents; iterator-first, protocol-hooked, one dependency.

title: toolpack-ai/toolpack-sdk
